overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic underground tunnel in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077 style). The scene features industrial concrete architecture with yellow neon lighting, ventilation pipes, and occasional vehicles passing by on the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground pedestrian walkway alongside vehicle tunnel

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk of the underground tunnel, observing the industrial architecture and neon lighting

entered.detail: dark industrial concrete wall with geometric paneling
horizontal yellow neon light strips mounted on the wall
large cylindrical metal ventilation duct attached to ceiling
thick concrete pillars separating the walkway from the road
long fluorescent tube lights mounted on the tunnel ceiling
multi-lane asphalt road with yellow dividing lines

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person walk through a futuristic underground tunnel. The environment features industrial concrete walls with yellow neon strips on the left, large ventilation pipes overhead, and a multi-lane road on the right separated by concrete pillars. The tunnel is empty of both pedestrians and vehicles, illuminated by artificial overhead lighting.

events.description: camera turns sharply to the right to observe the passing traffic on the road
biohazard truck with yellow warning symbol drives past on the road
white sedan follows the truck, driving along the tunnel road

agents.ego_description: turns to watch the passing vehicles including a biohazard truck and a white sedan driving through the tunnel

notable_agents.action: biohazard truck with yellow warning symbol driving past on the road
white sedan driving along the tunnel roadway

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right to focus on the tunnel's roadway, revealing passing traffic including a distinctive biohazard truck and a white sedan. The perspective shift brings the asphalt road into the center of the frame while the ventilation pipe moves out of view. The industrial concrete pillars recede into the background as the vehicles drive past.

events.description: camera returns to forward-facing direction to continue walking
approaching metal staircase exit on the left side of the tunnel

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk toward an exit staircase while vehicles occasionally pass on the right

notable_agents.action: white car driving past in the opposite direction

entered.detail: metal staircase with grated steps leading upward to an exit
black metal hand railing along the staircase

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to its forward-facing position and continues walking along the tunnel sidewalk. A metal staircase with hand railings appears on the left, indicating an approaching exit. The ventilation pipe comes back into view overhead as the camera advances, while occasional vehicles continue to pass by on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a futuristic underground tunnel that shifts from a quiet industrial corridor to a bustling roadway before approaching an exit. It begins with a walk along a concrete sidewalk flanked by yellow neon strips and overhead ventilation pipes, while a multi-lane road remains empty to the right. As the camera turns right, the focus shifts toward the asphalt road to reveal passing traffic, including a white sedan and a distinctive biohazard truck. The perspective then returns to a forward-facing position, moving past the receding concrete pillars as the ventilation pipes reappear overhead. Finally, the scene opens up to reveal a metal staircase with hand railings on the left, signaling an approaching exit while vehicles continue to stream by on the right.
